title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Tido Carriero describes how Cursor builds agent workflows across the full software development lifecycle, including bug triage, security review, and experimentation automation. The presentation addresses the 40% productivity plateau of coding assistants and argues the bottleneck lies in the broader SDLC, not just code writing.
